creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I forgot to mention, this arose from a question: 

Is any major proprietary software available for FreeBSD?
<https://old.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/w7akm8/-/>

I knew of the /commercial/software/ page, but could not recall the navigation. It's weird:  

1. Support menu

2. Vendors

3. do _not_ click 'Consulting Services' (the current name of the page)

4. click 'alphabetical'
